scripts.build:standalone: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.cpSync('dist/src/runtime','dist/runtime',{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('dist/src/reporting/public','dist/reporting/public',{recursive:true});" && bun build --compile ./src/cli.ts --outfile ./dist/jaiph
scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=32768 --enable-source-maps' node --test dist/test/*.test.js $(find dist/src -name '*.test.js' -o -name '*.acceptance.test.js')
scripts.test:acceptance: npm run test:acceptance:compiler && npm run test:acceptance:runtime
scripts.test:samples: npm run build && npx playwright test
